_meta.purpose: biblepedia place slug -> {lat, lon, conf, name, source}. Drives the Location mini-map on place articles (assets/js/biblepedia.js).
_meta.confidence: identified = dominant well-attested site; disputed = located but low-confidence/competing candidates; absent slug = location unknown.
_meta.attribution: Location data derived from OpenBible.info Bible Geocoding Data (github.com/openbibleinfo/Bible-Geocoding-Data), CC BY 4.0. Some entries (source:'curated') are supplemented for sites absent from that dataset.
